message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title US031 - As Team Member, I want to create a task in a user story

actor TeamMember

participant "CreateUSTaskUI" as UI
participant "CreateUSTaskController" as Controller
participant "Company" as Company
participant "taskTypeStore\nTaskTypeStore" as taskTypeStore
participant "taskTypeList\nList<TaskType>" as taskTypeList
participant "taskType\nTaskType" as taskType
participant "pStore\nProjectStore" as pStore
participant "proj : Project" as proj
participant "sList\nSprintList" as sList
participant "sprint : Sprint" as sprint
participant "sprintBacklog\nSprintBacklog" as sprintBacklog
participant "UserStoryList" as UserStoryList
participant "Us\nUsList" as Us
participant "taskList\nList<Task>" as taskList
participant "task : Task" as task
participant "tasksNames\nList<String>" as tasksNames
participant "projectTeam\nProjectTeam" as projectTeam
participant "projectTeam\nList<Resource>" as projectTeamList
participant "resource : Resource" as resource
participant "currentResName\nList<String>" as currentResName
participant "TaskMapper" as TaskMapper
participant "createTaskDTO\nCreateTaskDTO" as createTaskDTO
participant "newUs : Task" as newUs

TeamMember -> UI : 3 Ask to create a task of a user story
UI -> Controller : 2 getTaskTypes()
Controller -> Company : 3 getTaskTypeStore()
Company --> Controller : 4 taskTypeStore
Controller -> taskTypeStore : 5 getTaskTypeNames()

taskTypeStore -> taskTypeList : 6 create()

note right of taskTypeList
taskTypeNames
List<String>
end note

loop for each know task type
  taskTypeList -> taskTypeList : 7 get()
  taskTypeList -> taskType : 8 taskType
  taskType -> taskType : 9 getName()
  taskType --> taskTypeList : 10 typeName
  taskTypeList -> taskTypeList : 11 addTypeName()
  taskTypeList --> taskTypeList : 12 true
end

taskTypeStore --> Controller : 13 taskTypeNames
Controller --> UI : 14 taskTypeNames

UI --> TeamMember : 15 Show a list of task types
TeamMember -> UI : 16 Selects task type

UI -> Controller : 17 getIsTasksInprojCode, sprintID, usId)
Controller -> Company : 18 getProjectStore()
Company --> Controller : 19 pStore
Controller -> pStore : 20 getProjectByCode(projCode)
pStore --> Controller : 21 proj
Controller -> proj : 22 getSprintList()
proj --> Controller : 23 sList
Controller -> sList : 24 getSprintBySprintId()
sList --> Controller : 25 sprint
Controller -> sprint : 26 getBacklog()
sprint --> Controller : 27 sprintBacklog
Controller -> sprintBacklog : 28 getUsList()
sprintBacklog --> Controller : 29 usList
Controller -> Us : 30 getUs(usId)
Us --> Controller : 31 us
Controller -> Us : 32 getTaskList()
Us --> Controller : 33 usTaskList
Controller -> taskList : 34 getTaskNames()

taskList -> tasksNames : 35 create()

note right of tasksNames
tasksNames
List<String>
end note

loop for each know task
  tasksNames -> tasksNames : 36 get()
  tasksNames -> task : 37 task
  task -> task : 38 getName()
  task --> tasksNames : 39 taskName
  tasksNames -> tasksNames : 40 addTaskName()
  tasksNames --> tasksNames : 41 true
end

taskList --> Controller : 42 tasksNames
Controller --> UI : 43 tasksNames

UI --> TeamMember : 44 Show a list of current tasks\n(to choose a precedence, if want)
TeamMember -> UI : 45 Selects precedence (optional)

UI -> Controller : 46 getCurrentProjectTeam()
Controller -> proj : 47 getProjectTeam()
proj --> Controller : 48 projectTeam
Controller -> projectTeam : 49 getCurrentResourcesNames()

projectTeam -> currentResName : 50 create()

note right of currentResName
currentResName
List<String>
end note

loop for each know resource
  currentResName -> currentResName : 51 get()
  currentResName -> resource : 52 resource
  resource -> resource : 53 isCurrent()
  resource --> currentResName : 54 result
  alt result = true
    resource -> resource : 55 getName()
    resource --> currentResName : 56 resourceName
    currentResName -> currentResName : 57 addResourceName()
    currentResName --> currentResName : 58 true
  end
end

projectTeam --> Controller : 59 currentResourcesNames
Controller --> UI : 60 currentResourcesNames

UI --> TeamMember : Shows resource list and request data\n61 (name, description, effortEstimate,\ntaskType, responsible)
TeamMember -> UI : 62 Choose and typed requested data

UI -> Controller : 63 createIsTask(createIsTaskDTO)
Controller -> TaskMapper : 64 createIsTask(createIsTaskDTO)
TaskMapper -> Us : 65 toModel(createIsTaskDTO)

Us -> createTaskDTO : 66 name = getName()
createTaskDTO --> Us : 
Us -> createTaskDTO : 67 description = getDescription()
createTaskDTO --> Us : 
Us -> createTaskDTO : 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate()
createTaskDTO --> Us : 
Us -> createTaskDTO : 69 taskType = getTaskType()
createTaskDTO --> Us : 
Us -> createTaskDTO : 70 responsible = getResponsible()
createTaskDTO --> Us : 
Us -> newUs : 71 create(taskName, description,\neffortEstimate, taskType, responsible)
newUs --> Us : newUs : Task

Us -> Us : 72 newIsTask
Us -> Us : 73 saveTask(newIsTask)
Us -> Us : 74 validateIsTask(task)
Us --> Us : 
Us -> Us : 75 addIsTask(task)
Us --> Us : 
Us --> TaskMapper : 76 true

TaskMapper --> Controller : 
Controller --> UI : 77 created and saved successfully

UI --> TeamMember : 78 created and saved successfully

@enduml
```
